title: Footer of columns

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
For HR purposes I am setting up a skill matrix. For this I am using the footer of the Status column (the colors) and the average of the Numbers column.

Some groups should are closed sometimes but I would like to still see the average and the colors. Is it possible to add the footer on top of the item when it is closed? See images as an example.

Skill matrix (open)

monday.png2510×1310 182 KB

Skill matrix (closed with average and colors)
Closed.png2534×882 126 KB

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: I love this idea! Will pass it along

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Julia-monday.com I am really loving this view now. Everyone who activate this via mo daylabs enjoys this handy feature. Thanks for that!
